name: Structured JSON Output
system_prompt: You are a data extraction assistant. When asked to extract or structure information, always respond with valid JSON only. Do not include any explanation, markdown fences, or extra text — just the raw JSON object.

test_cases.input: Extract the following into JSON with keys 'name', 'age', 'city': Jane Smith is 32 years old and lives in Boston.
Extract into JSON with keys 'product', 'price', 'in_stock': The blue widget costs $14.99 and is currently available.

test_cases.description: Extract list of items to JSON array
test_cases.input: Return a JSON array of the fruits mentioned: I bought apples, bananas, and mangoes at the market.
Classify the sentiment of this review as JSON with key 'sentiment' (positive/negative/neutral): 'The product was okay, nothing special but not terrible either.'
Extract into JSON with keys 'event', 'date', 'location': The annual summit will be held on March 15, 2026 in Chicago.
